title: Interpret legislation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Interpret legislation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine applicable legal framework

pcs.text: Identify and access current legislation, regulations, organisational procedures, standards and codes of practice affecting the workplace, industry, occupation or client

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access current legislation, regulations, organisational procedures, standards and codes of practice affecting the workplace, industry, occupation or client.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify consequences of non-compliance with legislation, regulations, organisational procedures, standards and codes of practice.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify areas of uncertainty in own work related to compliance requirements, and take action to clarify issues.
